2271250.name: Emergent-Z
2271250.description:
How will you survive when the world begins to fall apart?
Welcome to Emergent-Z—the ultimate pre-apocalyptic zombie survival experience, where every decision shapes your story. Fight to survive as a human or embrace chaos as a zombie. The choice is yours.

Fight for Survival as a Human

  • Scavenge for supplies and fortify your base to withstand the growing undead threat.

  • Team up with survivors, assign tasks, and keep everyone alive.

  • Every mistake is deadly—zombies are always hunting.

Lead the Horde as a Zombie

  • Command a relentless horde and unleash chaos on human survivors.

  • Grow stronger with every victim and unlock unique zombie abilities.

  • Outwit fortified defenses in the ultimate battle for dominance.

Live the Outbreak

  • Dynamic day-night cycles, resource management, and the freedom to shape your story.

  • EmergentSync connects every player’s world in a shared, evolving apocalypse.

The outbreak is here—humanity’s survival hangs by a thread. Will you rise to the challenge or plunge the world into chaos? Choose your side in Emergent-Z!
2271250.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
